zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Müller於1655年5月6日出生在瑞士波藍根塔爾時，她的父親Jacob Müller44歲，母親Verena Boesinger37歲。她於1676年10月6日與Friedrich Leibenguth在瑞士波梅爾瑙結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1730年之前在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Müller于1655年5月6日出生在瑞士波藍根塔爾时，她的父亲Jacob Müller44岁，母亲Verena Boesinger37岁。她于1676年10月6日与Friedrich Leibenguth在瑞士波梅爾瑙结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1730年之前在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森。

nameMeanings.name: Müller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Franz, Gerhard, Uwe, Dieter, Heinz, Jurgen.
German (Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; mainly Müller): see Mueller . This surname is also very common in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Windmiller
meanings: Americanized form of German Windmüller, an occupational name for a miller (see Muller ).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Müller was born on 6 May 1655, in Langenthal, Bern, Switzerland, her father, Jacob Müller, was 44 and her mother, Verena Boesinger, was 37. She married Friedrich Leibenguth on 6 October 1676, in Melchnau, Bern, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died before 1730, in Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Müller est née le 6 mai 1655, à Langenthal, Berne, Suisse, son père, Jacob Müller, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Verena Boesinger, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich Leibenguth le 6 octobre 1676, à Melchnau, Berne, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1730, à Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Müller am 6. Mai 1655 in Langenthal, Bern, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacob Müller 44 und ihre Mutter Verena Boesinger 37. Sie hat am 6. Oktober 1676 in Melchnau, Bern, Schweiz Friedrich Leibenguth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb vor 1730 in Mühlhausen, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Müller è nata il il 6 maggio 1655 nel Langenthal, Berna, Svizzera, sua padre, Jacob Müller, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Verena Boesinger, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich Leibenguth il 6 ottobre 1676, nel Melchnau, Berna, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1730, nel Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Müllerが1655年5月6日にスイスバーンランジェンサルで生まれた時，父Jacob Müllerは44歳，母Verena Boesingerは37歳であった。1676年10月6日にスイスバーンメルチナウでFriedrich Leibenguthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1730年以前にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンムルハウセンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Müller(이)가 1655년 5월 6일 스위스 버 랭솔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacob Müller(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Verena Boesinger(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1676년 10월 6일 스위스 버 멜ch나에서 Friedrich Leibenguth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1730년 이전 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 뮐하우센에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Müller nasceu em 6 de maio de 1655, em Langenthal, Bern, Suiça, seu pai, Jacob Müller, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Verena Boesinger, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich Leibenguth em 6 de outubro de 1676, em Melchnau, Bern, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 1730, em Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Müller родилась 6 мая 1655 г. в местности лангентэл, бирн, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Jacob Müller было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Verena Boesinger, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich Leibenguth 6 октября 1676 г. в местности мелчнау, бирн, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла перед 1730 г. в местности мулхаусен, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Müller nació el 6 de mayo de 1655, en Langenthal, Bern, Suiza, su papá, Jacob Müller, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Verena Boesinger, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Friedrich Leibenguth el 6 de octubre de 1676, en Melchnau, Bern, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de 1730, en Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.
